Sabesp Case Study

Improving Submersible Pump Efficiency

Home Industries Proof Resources Contact Assets

Overview

Sabesp, Brazil's largest water and sewage utility company, deployed Samotics condition monitoring across their submersible pump fleet.

18%
Energy Reduction
40%
Downtime Reduction

The Challenge

Sabesp operates thousands of submersible pumps distributed across São Paulo. These pumps are difficult to access and monitor, making condition assessment challenging. Energy costs and unexpected failures were major operational issues.

The Solution

Samotics implemented real-time electrical signature analysis monitoring on a portion of the pump fleet. Our algorithms detected pumps running inefficiently due to cavitation, misalignment, or internal wear.

Results

  • 18% reduction in energy consumption
  • 40% reduction in unplanned downtime
  • Early detection of inefficient operation enabled corrective maintenance
  • Significant cost savings through both energy reduction and maintenance optimization
